Package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl

Class KnowledgeIngestorRequestImpl

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.connect.impl.AbstractConnectorRequest<KnowledgeIngestorResponse>
org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl.KnowledgeIngestorRequestImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
KnowledgeIngestorRequest, ConnectorRequest<KnowledgeIngestorResponse>
public class KnowledgeIngestorRequestImpl extends AbstractConnectorRequest<KnowledgeIngestorResponse> implements KnowledgeIngestorRequest
Default implementation of KnowledgeIngestorRequest.
